scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:format
scripts.lint:eslint: eslint --cache --cache-strategy content --concurrency auto src/app src/components src/lib src/types scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts --ignore-pattern 'src/**/__tests__/**' --ignore-pattern 'src/data/**'
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:all:eslint && npm run lint:all:format
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:eslint && npm run lint:fix:format
scripts.lint:format: prettier --check --cache --cache-strategy content src/app src/components src/lib src/types scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts
scripts.lint:all:eslint: eslint --cache --cache-strategy content --concurrency auto src scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts
scripts.lint:all:format: prettier --check --cache --cache-strategy content src scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix:eslint: eslint --cache --cache-strategy content --concurrency auto src/app src/components src/lib src/types scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts --ignore-pattern 'src/**/__tests__/**' --ignore-pattern 'src/data/**' --fix
scripts.lint:fix:format: prettier --write src/app src/components src/lib src/types scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix:all: npm run lint:fix:all:eslint && npm run lint:fix:all:format
scripts.lint:fix:all:eslint: eslint --cache --cache-strategy content --concurrency auto src scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts --fix
scripts.lint:fix:all:format: prettier --write src scripts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts
